title: SPATRA showcases AI-driven rail and road transport services
summary: The EUSPA-funded SPATRA project highlights its use of AI and Copernicus data to forecast rail-track temperature and optimise road logistics.
body: SPATRA (Space-based Applications for Transport Monitoring and Management) develops two demonstrators: a rail-temperature service predicting track-buckling risk, and a road traffic-flow and logistics-monitoring application. The project illustrates how AI applied to Copernicus and EGNSS data creates practical transport services.
